RTCR COND FAN6 Device absent from network RTCR COND FAN2 Device absent from network
**Retail process, Vendor training, and access to Maximo:

If this work order is assigned to a refrigerant containing asset Retail requires you to comply with all EPA record tracking requirements (Clean Air Act, Section 608). If this is a scheduled Leak Inspection work order or if refrigerant was added to a system with a capacity over 50lbs you must create a service event in Trakref.
If the asset is not available in Trakref please email Refrigerant.Tracking@retailcorp.com and provide asset details including: Make/Model/Serial/Refrigerant Type/Refrigerant Capacity.
a. Not To Exceed (NTE) will be enforced. Repair expenses in excess of the NTE must have prior approval before completing work.
c. Non-proposal NTE authorizations and questions: 888.888.0304
d. A valid WO number is required for invoices to be submitted via Ariba
e. Invoices will not be paid until Retail required documentation is submitted
2. Retail Corporation expects that you will complete this service on or before the requested repair by date listed above.

3. Log into Partners Online and access the Maximo application to update all of the required fields upon completion of this WO. If WO information is not updated online, invoices will not be processed for payment.
4. Work shall be performed in compliance with all federal, state and local laws, rules and regulations. Follow all lock-out, tag-out procedures.
5. This work order is considered part of and subject to your contract with Retail unless otherwise agreed in writing by Retail.
To make changes to your company information listed below, please submit the
Company Contacts Form (Note: Only one email address can be listed as the recipient of work order notifications).
